commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8fe498124ab374705367f0e5c0bfaf9b6c1eab40)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Azure `text` content and `response.text.delta` handling to `src/llm/providers/openai-responses-shared.ts` and adds Azure conversion/stream tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +349. Total +375 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible but not live-reproduced here: if Azure emits the claimed `text`/`response.text.delta` shape, current main's active parser drops it and can leave `assistantTexts` empty, but no captured after-fix Azure payload is attached.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers require contributor or maintainer changes plus real Azure proof, so this external PR is not a safe automated repair lane yet.

target.title: fix: support Azure Responses API text content type
target.author: bladin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
